title: Meltwatch Product Features
content: Meltwatch is a real-time brand sentiment monitoring platform with features including: 1) Multi-platform review aggregation; 2) AI-powered sentiment analysis (positive/negative/neutral); 3) Keyword extraction using TF-IDF; 4) Pain point detection across 6 categories; 5) Trend tracking and visualization; 6) Report generation and export. Supported platforms include Generic web, Dianping, and JD.com.
content_zh: Meltwatch 是一个实时品牌舆情监控平台，功能包括：1) 多平台评论聚合；2) AI驱动的情感分析（正面/负面/中性）；3) 使用TF-IDF的关键词提取；4) 6类痛点检测；5) 趋势跟踪和可视化；6) 报告生成和导出。支持平台包括通用网页、大众点评和京东。
